transactions.reason: Patient BUY MU â€” 9B/1S (90.4% conf), 5/7 TFs BUY (Now+12h+2d+3mo+6mo), MACD +1.21, vol 2.24x confirming, EMA+trend+structure+smart_money aligned. Strongest sustained signal since tracking. Watchlist condition met: MU strengthened from 7B/1S to 9B/1S.
Patient SELL 50% MU — 2xATR stop breached ($412.81 vs $404.52, blown by $8). Thesis collapsed 9B/1S to 4B/6S. Trending-down, vol 2.1x. Keeping half for RSI 22.6 oversold bounce.

Bold BUY ETH â€” 4/9 consensus (EMA+MACD+F&G+Ministral), Now+12h aligned BUY, extreme fear F&G=5, MACD strongest positive reading (0.87). 156 check-ins in, first trade. Bold rules: 3+ consensus + extreme fear = act.

Bold BUY BTC â€” 4/9 consensus (EMA+MACD+F&G+ML), 5 consecutive BUY checks (strongest sustained signal tracked), MACD +3.15 (rising), extreme fear F&G=5, weak DXY (-0.83%), falling 10Y yields. Bold rules: 3+ consensus + extreme fear = act.

Bold SELL 50% ETH â€” SELL streak=5 checks, vol 0.53x crosses >0.5x exit threshold, MACD worsening (-3.09), below lower BB, all 7 TFs SELL (except 12h phantom). Triggered pre-set exit rule. Realizing -0.79% loss on half position.

Bold SELL 50% remaining ETH â€” 5/9 SELL consensus (EMA+MACD+Ministral+ML+BB), ALL 7 TFs SELL (Now through 6mo), MACD -7.18, below lower BB, RSI 30.2. Cutting losses at -2.53% from entry. ETH downtrend confirmed across every horizon.

Bold SELL 50% BTC â€” SELL 4/7 consensus (EMA+Ministral+ML+Volume), ALL 7 TFs SELL except 6mo HOLD, MACD -187.01 (worst ever, accelerating), vol 1.95x confirming sell-off, RSI 29.6. Price -2.75% from entry ($68,210->$66,333). Cutting losses.

Bold SELL 50% remaining ETH â€” SELL 4/9 (EMA+Ministral+ML+Volume), all 7 TFs SELL, MACD -8.71, vol 1.50x confirming, RSI 25.2 (near record low), below lower BB. HOLD at #298 lasted one check-in â€” noise confirmed. Cutting at -3.63% from entry.

Bold SELL 50% remaining BTC â€” SELL 4/9 (EMA+Ministral+ML+Volume), 6/7 TFs SELL, MACD -242 (4th consecutive new worst), vol 1.92x confirming sell-off, RSI 27.0. Momentum still accelerating down. Cutting at -3.64% from entry.

Bold BUY MU â€” 9B/1S (90.4% conf), 5/7 TFs BUY, vol 2.24x confirming structural breakout. EMA+trend+structure+smart_money+fibonacci all BUY. Strongest signal on the board. BB inside, RSI 60.6 â€” not overextended. Conviction entry.

Bold BUY NVDA â€” 9B/2S (76% conf), 6/7 TFs BUY (Now/12h/2d/7d/1mo/6mo), vol 1.72x expanding, above upper BB = breakout. Smart_money+structure+fibonacci+heikin_ashi aligned. Strongest TF alignment since tracking. Conviction entry.

Bold BUY TSM â€” 7B/0S (100% conf), 5/7 TFs BUY (Now/12h/2d/7d/1mo), vol 3.15x confirming structural breakout. MACD crossing positive, RSI 60.4 (not overextended). Strongest unanimous signal since tracking. 3rd and final position.
Bold SELL TSM - breakout failed same day. Broke 2xATR stop ($368.20). Signals collapsed from 7B/0S at entry to 1B/0S. Full exit at -1.25% from entry.
Bold SELL MU â€” breakout thesis broken. 9B/1S collapsed to 3B/3S, vol 1.89x distribution, 2xATR stop breached ($414.25 vs $414.77). Full exit at -2.2%.
Bold SELL NVDA — price $186 below $188 watchlist exit. 4B/8S, trending-down, vol 2.19x confirming. Breakout thesis failed (entry above upper BB, now below lower BB). Full exit at -2.1%.
